title: メラメラ・ファイアー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking by the academy
entrance...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... still not enough power! But that was the
final finishing move in my arsenal...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was trying to muster up some power to take on
my next race!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I could show my face to my
wrestler papa if I lose in a battle of strength!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Fate must've brought you here at just
the right time!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You know of any ways to boost power? Give me
some pointers, por favor!
choice_data_list: You could eat a stamina-boosting meal.
You could try sprinting with a tire tied to you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, interesante! So all I gotta do is generate the
power from inside my body, eh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gotta strike while the iron is caliente! Off to the
cafeteriaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Problem passionately solved! Call me El
Condor Happy! That's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm muy motivada now! Time to hit the traaack!
